description: A new conveyor belt system has been installed. A commissioning engineer must run it through a series of tests before it can be handed over to operations.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the commissioning test plan for the conveyor system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the list of required tests, such as 'Belt Tracking Test' and 'Emergency Stop Test'.

nodes.task_description: Execute each test and record the pass/fail result in the commissioning system.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer performs the tests and logs the results. One test ('Vibration Check') fails.

nodes.task_description: Create a punch list item for the failed test and assign it to the construction contractor to fix.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new punch list item detailing the failure and assigns it to the responsible party.
